name: Dwarf
summary: Hardy mountain folk. Strong constitution and wisdom, resistant to magic and poison, but socially gruff.

traits.name: Hardy
traits.summary: +2 saves vs poison, spells, and spell-like abilities.

traits.name: Stability
traits.summary: +4 CMD vs bull rush and trip while standing.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.summary: +2 Perception for stonework; automatic check within 10 ft.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.summary: Treat any weapon with 'dwarven' in its name as martial.
